'''Vastrip IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Vastrip system/Legends|Vastrip system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] Territories. It was [[Lar Maendin]]'s [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].
